programme.title: North Africa-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is stranded in Northern Africa and gets jugaad in finding water, food and a shelter. S04 E13.

programme.title: Norway: Edge of Survival-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls attempts to survive the conditions in Norway while equipped with the latest technology. S06 E03.

programme.title: Working the Wild-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls provides a glimpse into his crew that follows his adventurous antics. S07 E06.

programme.title: Siberia-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls treks across the Siberian tundra and into the Sayan Mountains. S05 E13.

programme.title: Siberia-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls treks across the Siberian tundra and into the Sayan Mountains. S05 E13.

programme.title: Cape Wrath, Scotland-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear makes a wetsuit from a dead seal and has a close call with a rockfall in Cape Wrath. S06 E02.

programme.title: Behind the Wild-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: A dedicated team follows Bear Grylls, capturing his struggles and challenges on camera. S05 E07.

programme.title: Deserted Island-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls survives the Pacific Ocean, encountering coral reefs and relentless surf. S01 E09.

programme.title: African Savannah-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls travels across Kenya to demonstrate how to survive the African savannah. S01 E07.

programme.title: Mount Kilauea-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls shows how to survive the big island of Hawaii, home to an active volcano. S01 E05.

programme.title: Alaskan Mountain Range-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear uses his skills and knowledge to journey across the Chugach Mountains, Alaska. S01 E04.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave's fortunes go up in flames as Jarrod and Brandi dive back in and hit bottom. S10 E02.

programme.title: Bison and Chokecherries-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E03.

programme.title: Texas Hog and Beautyberry-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E02.

programme.title: Exploring The Unknown With Wang Yibo
programme.desc: Chinese actor and singer Wang Yibo undertakes outdoor adventures in extreme environments.

programme.title: Big Sky Country-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear paraglides into the Rockies, traverses huge waterfalls and navigates deep gullies. S04 E09.
